    tenant_id = models.CharField(max_length=36)

    eway_bill_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    eway_bill_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)

    extension_date = models.DateField(blank=True, null=True)
    extended_ewb_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    extension_reason = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)
    from_place = models.CharField(max_length=100, blank=True, null=True)

    new_validity = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    updated_vehicle_no = models.CharField(max_length=50, blank=True, null=True)
    irn = models.CharField(max_length=255, blank=True, null=True)

    invoice_id = models.BigIntegerField(blank=True, null=True)
